title: CRITICAL: tailwindcss-animate plugin missing — 77 animation classes silently broken
description:
C4: The tailwindcss-animate plugin provides classes like `animate-in`, `animate-out`, `fade-in-0`, `zoom-in-95`, `slide-in-from-*`, `slide-out-to-*`. These are used 77 times across Dialog, Select, Menubar, ContextMenu, AlertDialog, DropdownMenu, Sheet, NavigationMenu, Popover, and more. The plugin is:
- NOT in dependencies
- NOT in peerDependencies  
- NOT in tailwind.config.js plugins
- NOT mentioned in README

All entry/exit animations silently render as static no-ops with zero motion. No errors or warnings — just dead animations.
resolution: Installed tailwindcss-animate, added to tailwind.config.js plugins and vite external list
